subject: Re: Fwd: Fw: [eastvi] FW: Review of GSJ EAR
body:
ok


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, May 23, 2007 12:23:25 PM
Subject: Fwd: Fw: [eastvi] FW: Review of GSJ EAR


There will be newspaper coverage of the hearing and a talking piece summarizing the problems with the Application has been circulated to the papers.  McComb has forwarded his report to EAST(Environmental Association of St. Thomas/St. John), but other than this e-mail, I have not received any information that EAST is going to make any statement at the hearing.  McComb is going to attend the hearing (he has not decided whether his attendance is or is not on your behalf but that would not be a matter of public record unless he actually spoke out at the hearing).  Bill will not speak out at the hearing on your behalf without receiving express direction to do so from me.  Bill recommends making no statement, seeing if anyone else does, and if noone else does or noone does so effectively, writing within 7 days after the hearing a less public objection letter which he would send to DPNR and all of the committee members.  If this letter did not motivate CZM it would at least
 preserve standing for you if it should ever become necessary to appeal.  
 
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
 
------------------------------ 
IRS Circular 230 Legend: Any advice contained herein was not intended or written to be used, and cannot be used, for the purpose of avoiding U.S. federal, state, or local tax penalties. Unless otherwise specifically indicated above, you should assume that any statement in this email relating to any U.S. federal, state, or local tax matter was written in connection with the promotion or marketing by other parties of the transaction(s) or matter(s) addressed in this email. Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's particular circumstances from an independent tax advisor. 
=================================================================

Indyke, Esq. that constitute attorney work product or that are otherwise confidential and/or privileged. Except for personal use by the intended recipient, or as expressly authorized by the sender, any person who receives this information is prohibited from disclosing, copying, distributing, and/or using it. If you have received this communication in error, please immediately delete it and all copies, and promptly notify the sender at the above telephone number or electronic mail address. Nothing in this communication is intended to operate as an electronic signature under applicable law.

----- Original Message ----- 
From: Carla Joseph 
To: Environmental Association St. Thomas and St. John ; Jason Budson ; Dayle Barry ; Dayle Barry 
Sent: Monday, May 21, 2007 8:01 PM
Subject: [eastvi] FW: Review of GSJ EAR



Hi Everyone,
 
Over the past week, Dalma and I have been trying to resolve some issues relative to the CZM Division not forwarding any CZM application/ EARs to EAST.    I have checked the mail regularly, but haven't received any notice in the mail.  On several occasions, Dalma has indicated to CZM that all EARs should be delivered to his office in WAPA.  Anyway, today Dalma went to DPNR and physically collected the EAR for Great St. James.  EAST former Treasurer, Bill McComb, has reviewed the EAR and supplied us with the attached comments on the St. James Development.  I really would like a group of individuals to take a look at both Bill's comments and the EAR.  I know it's rather late, but I would like Jason, Greg, Geoff and Dayle to take a look at the EAR.  Let me know what your thoughts are.  We could take the position of attending the meeting and putting in record that although we are on the mailing list that we did not receive the EAR in sufficient time to do a proper and thorough
 review and will forward our comments in writing in the coming week.  Please let me know your thoughts.   Again, thank you for your time, talents and support.


Carla Joseph
 
 






From: wfmccomb.eng@ attglobal. net
To: azanda@hotmail. com
Subject: Fw: Review of GSJ EAR
Date: Mon, 21 May 2007 12:23:20 -0400


 
----- Original Message ----- 
From: William McComb 
To: Carla Joseph 
Sent: Thursday, May 17, 2007 2:53 PM
Subject: Review of GSJ EAR


Carla:
 
Attached is a review of the Great St. James EAR.  It is a typical Bill Karr Submittal.
 
If EAST wants to, you can use any and all of the attached write-up.
 
I have not been paid by anyone to do the review.
 
I will call you (at what number?) on Monday, to find out what EAST will do.
 
Bill

Hi Everyone,
 
Over the past week, Dalma and I have been trying to resolve some issues relative to the CZM Division not forwarding any CZM application/ EARs to EAST.    I have checked the mail regularly, but haven't received any notice in the mail.  On several occasions, Dalma has indicated to CZM that all EARs should be delivered to his office in WAPA.  Anyway, today Dalma went to DPNR and physically collected the EAR for Great St. James.  EAST former Treasurer, Bill McComb, has reviewed the EAR and supplied us with the attached comments on the St. James Development.  I really would like a group of individuals to take a look at both Bill's comments and the EAR.  I know it's rather late, but I would like Jason, Greg, Geoff and Dayle to take a look at the EAR.  Let me know what your thoughts are.  We could take the position of attending the meeting and putting in record that although we are on the mailing list that we did not receive the EAR in sufficient time to do a proper and thorough review and will forward our comments in writing in the coming week.  Please let me know your thoughts.   Again, thank you for your time, talents and support.
